mapper.sql: id, min_days, max_days, bonus_points, reward_tier, reward_desc, enabled, created_at, updated_at, version
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sign_in_consecutive_reward_config WHERE enabled = 1 AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY min_days ASC

SELECT FROM sign_in_consecutive_reward_config WHERE enabled = 1 AND deleted_at IS NULL AND #{consecutiveDays} >= min_days AND (max_days IS NULL OR #{consecutiveDays} <= max_days) ORDER BY min_days ASC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE sign_in_consecutive_reward_config SET min_days = #{minDays}, max_days = #{maxDays}, bonus_points = #{bonusPoints}, reward_tier = #{rewardTier}, reward_desc = #{rewardDesc}, enabled = #{enabled}, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
